text.title: Video Gen Basics — Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure for a single-clip AI video generation: build prompt → cache probe → submit → poll → download → ffprobe.

step.name: build-prompt
step.input: brief dict (subject, action, setting, camera, style, lighting, duration_s, aspect_ratio, subject_consistency_required)
step.action: Invoke VideoPromptBuilder; reject if camera is empty (rule r1). If subject_consistency_required, switch input_mode to image-to-video and require anchor_image_url (rule r2).
step.output: structured prompt text + selected input_mode (text2video | image2video).
step.decision-gate: if camera empty AND no explicit `static` default → return error "camera required".

step.name: probe-cache
step.input: prompt text, provider, seed, duration_s, aspect_ratio
step.action: Compute prompt_hash = sha256(prompt + provider + str(seed) + str(duration_s) + aspect_ratio); probe `{output_dir}/{prompt_hash}.mp4`. If present, run ffprobe; if valid, return cached=true.

step.name: submit-job
step.input: structured prompt, input_mode, anchor_image (if image2video), duration_s, aspect_ratio, seed
step.action: Provider-specific submission: Runway `client.image_to_video.create(...)`; Luma `httpx.post("/generations", ...)`; Replicate `replicate.run(version, input)`. Capture task_id.

step.name: poll-status
step.action: Loop with `sleep(5)`; query provider status endpoint. Terminate on SUCCEEDED / FAILED / timeout. Cap total wall-clock at timeout_s.
step.output: status enum + video_url on success, error_message on failure.
step.decision-gate: if FAILED → check for content-policy keywords; do NOT retry without prompt revision.

step.name: download
step.action: Stream download via `requests.get(url, stream=True)` writing to `{output_dir}/{prompt_hash}.mp4`. Buffer max 1 MB chunks to avoid OOM on memory-constrained hosts.

step.name: ffprobe-validate
step.action: Run `ffprobe -v error -show_streams -show_format -of json local_path`. Parse JSON; require duration > 0, at least one video stream, file size > 100 KB.
step.output: ffprobe object (size, duration, streams, width, height) attached to result.
step.decision-gate: if ffprobe shows 0-duration or no video stream → return status="failed", error="ffprobe validation".
